result: The task has been completed successfully. The output file 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv' contains 16,111 rows with NSID and alcfst variables. The alcfst variable correctly identifies the earliest age of alcohol consumption for each cohort member, with factor levels for ages 14, 15, 16, 17, 19, 20, 25, and 32, plus special codes 99 (never had alcohol) and -8 (insufficient information).
